description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a wooden fence and a well-maintained grassy yard. The exterior walls are clad in brown brick, and the house features a flat roof with a small overhang above the main entrance. Large rectangular windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. A single-car garage with a dark gable roof is attached to the left side of the house, accessible via a driveway. The property is landscaped with several mature trees at the corners of the yard, enhancing privacy and curb appeal. The main entryway is marked by a simple brown door and a covered porch area.
description: A modern, two-story brick house with a flat roof, attached garage, large windows, and a fenced grassy yard with mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, attached garage, and two trees in the background.
description_view_1: Rear view with a plain brick wall, minimal windows, and two trees at the back corners of the yard.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the garage, covered porch, and two trees flanking the fence line.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage's gable roof, flat main roof, and a tree near the front corner.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple brown door with a covered porch, no steps, and minimal decorative elements
